objectives: Use Python to load, inspect, and manipulate image data structures for vision workflows
learning_path.title: Python Setup and Image Data Basics

objectives: Apply Linear Algebra concepts to understand image representations and neural network computations
learning_path.title: Linear Algebra Foundations for Vision and Deep Learning

objectives: Perform core vision operations and understand common image transformations using OpenCV
learning_path.title: Computer Vision Fundamentals with OpenCV

objectives: Build robust preprocessing and augmentation pipelines to improve model generalization
learning_path.title: Data Preprocessing and Augmentation for Vision Models

objectives: Explain and implement the main building blocks of Convolutional Neural Networks (Cnns) for image tasks
learning_path.title: Convolutional Neural Networks (Cnns) Core Concepts

objectives: Implement Convolutional Neural Networks (Cnns) architectures and forward passes using PyTorch
learning_path.title: Building CNNs in PyTorch

objectives: Train vision models and evaluate performance using appropriate metrics and validation strategies
learning_path.title: Model Training And Evaluation for Vision Models

objectives: Understand and implement baseline approaches for Object Detection And Segmentation tasks
learning_path.title: Object Detection And Segmentation Fundamentals

objectives: Train and evaluate Object Detection And Segmentation models end-to-end using PyTorch workflows
learning_path.title: Training Object Detection And Segmentation Models in PyTorch

objectives: Integrate OpenCV-based preprocessing with deep learning inference and evaluation in a single pipeline
learning_path.title: End-to-End Vision Pipeline with OpenCV and Deep Learning

matched_occupation.description: Computer vision engineers research, design, develop, and train artificial intelligence algorithms and machine learning primitives that understand the content of digital images based on a large amount of data. They apply this understanding to solve different real-world problems such as security, autonomous driving, robotic manufacturing, digital image classification, medical image processing and diagnosis, etc.
matched_occupation.label: computer vision engineer
